strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple production systems
Proven ability to own end-to-end projects, including backend, frontend, DevOps, and even mobile app maintenance
Strong open-source contributions and community engagement, particularly in GIS and developer tooling
concerns: Job titles (e.g., Staff Software Engineer) appear inconsistent with timeline and seniority expectations for a junior/mid-level role
Limited explicit mention of PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or AWS services beyond CDK — key required/nice-to-have skills
German language proficiency is only basic, while high on-site presence in Berlin is required
response.justification: The candidate brings deep, diverse fullstack experience with TypeScript and modern web architectures, alongside strong ownership of complex systems and open-source initiatives — but lacks clear alignment with required database and framework specifics, and the limited German proficiency may hinder on-site collaboration despite extensive technical qualifications.
